name: Zucchini Pizza Strips
recipeIngredient: 4 fresh basil leaves, cut into thin strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Cut the zucchini lengthwise into flat strips that are 1/4 inch thick. Bring half an inch of water to a boil in a skillet. Add the zucchini strips, cover, and cook for 3 minutes. Using a slotted spatula, remove the strips to a baking dish lined with foil.
3. Sprinkle the zucchini with tomato, carrot, and basil. Top each with some cheese. Bake for 20 minutes or until the cheese has melted. Let the pizzas cool slightly before serving.
